title: Promote corelib-api-shape to Standard with tier pipeline

source.subject: orchestrate(beskid-v0-3): promote corelib-api-shape to Standard with tier pipeline

body:
## What shipped

Orchestration promotes the **corelib-api-shape** platform-spec feature to **Standard** and documents the tier tagging pipeline used by publish and coverage gates.

## Platform specification

- **API shape** — `/platform-spec/core-library/api-shape` — *tracks* (required)

## Source commit

Repository **`beskid`** · commit `d137f11`

> orchestrate(beskid-v0-3): promote corelib-api-shape to Standard with tier pipeline

## Completed

2026-05-23 (catalog cutoff window).
